name: Creamy Asparagus Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook asparagus in boiling water in a 2-quart saucepan until tender; drain, reserving half cup cooking liquid.
2. Place reserved liquid and all but half cup asparagus in blender or food processor; blend until smooth.
3. In same saucepan, combine cornstarch, salt, and pepper; gradually stir in milk until smooth.
4. Add butter; stirring constantly, heat over medium-low heat until boiling for 1 minute.
5. Stir in asparagus puree and sherry; blend well, then add reserved half cup asparagus.
6. Cook until heated through, stirring constantly.
